production_call_path.scope_decision: Beauty is the sole E01 domain because it has the matched production trio: AdaptiveWise host, final-v2 full with phi_u_ds=0, and global_p. ML1M is excluded because its frozen host uses the hybrid graph; this trace does not claim ML1M equivalence.

protocol.canonical_mapping_policy: canonical names align shared values only; real parameter ownership and optimizer membership are never normalized
